allow:

no
EOF)
Bash(cd "F:/active DB/active DB backend" && cargo check 2>&1)

Bash(cd "F:/active DB" && git clone https://github.com/re-rank/helix-db.git helix-db-fork 2>&1)
Bash(cd "F:/active DB" && git remote add upstream https://github.com/helixdb/helix-db.git 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/f/active DB/activedb-engine" && git init && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: initialize ActiveDB engine repository" && git branch -M main && git remote add origin https://github.com/re-rank/activedb-engine.git && git push -u origin main 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/f/active DB/activedb-cloud" && git init && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: initialize ActiveDB cloud service" && git branch -M main && git remote add origin https://github.com/re-rank/activedb-cloud.git && git push -u origin main 2>&1)
